DMSTAr 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started with DMSTAr
    • k-HLR relationships
    • Phosphorus Kinetics in DMSTAr
  • Changelog

DMSTA phosphorus engine (internal)

Source: R/P_engine.R
internal_dmsta_phosphorus.Rd

Internal helpers implementing DMSTA coupled phosphorus mass balance within a tank series, including derivative evaluation and RK4 stepping.

Computes instantaneous derivatives dMdt and dSdt for one tank at a single RK stage. This corresponds to DMSTA "DerivMass" logic and includes uptake, recycle, sediment/burial, direct sedimentation, and advective transport driven by tank outflow and seepage.

Advances tank states M and S forward by one substep of length Dt (days) using a 4th-order Runge-Kutta integrator. Stage-specific driver fields StepFrac, Ddt, Mo_fix, and So_fix are injected before calling dmsta_deriv_mass().

Integrates DMSTA hydrology over one day (via dmsta_flow_day_steps()) and then integrates phosphorus mass balance across tanks using RK4 substeps. Returns daily totals for flows and loads, updated tank states, and optional water and mass budget diagnostics.

dmsta_deriv_mass(state, drivers, ppar, constants)

dmsta_rk4_P_step(
  M,
  S,
  args_base,
  Dt,
  ppar,
  constants,
  clamp = TRUE,
  Mmin = 0,
  Smin = 0
)

dmsta_flowP_day(
  V,
  P_state,
  tanks,
  inputs,
  params,
  ppar,
  constants,
  Nsteps = 4L,
  Z_plant = 0
)

Arguments

state

Named list containing tank state:

M

Numeric scalar. Water-column mass/state for the tank (kg).

S

Numeric scalar. Sediment/areal store for the tank (kg).

drivers

Named list of stage-specific drivers and geometry. Expected fields include:

A_tank

Tank area (same area units as A_cell).

A_cell

Cell area.

V_tank_avg

Average tank volume for the substep (e.g., hm^3).

Vdel

Change in tank volume over the substep (same units as V_tank_avg).

StepFrac

RK stage fraction in {0, 0.5, 1}.

Ddt

Effective duration used in limiter logic (days).

Qo_tank

Tank outflow rate (volume/day).

Li_tank

Tank inflow load rate (kg/day).

Rain

Rain rate (m/day).

Seepout

Cell seep-out flow rate (volume/day).

Seepin

Cell seep-in flow rate (volume/day).

Z_plant

Rolling/representative plant depth used for reservoir blending (m).

julian

Julian day (numeric) used for seasonal modulation.

Mo_fix

Reference M for the RK stage limiter (kg).

So_fix

Reference S for the RK stage limiter (kg).

ppar

Phosphorus kinetic parameter list, typically from build_P_kin_slots().

constants

Constants list used by dmsta_deriv_mass().

M

Numeric scalar. Current water-column state for the tank (kg).

S

Numeric scalar. Current areal/sediment store for the tank (kg).

args_base

Named list with element drivers, itself a named list containing all fields required by dmsta_deriv_mass() except StepFrac, Ddt, Mo_fix, So_fix.

Dt

Numeric scalar. Step duration (days), typically 1/Nsteps.

clamp

Logical; if TRUE, clamp outputs to Mmin and Smin.

Mmin

Numeric scalar. Minimum allowed M after clamping.

Smin

Numeric scalar. Minimum allowed S after clamping.

V

Numeric scalar. Starting cell volume (e.g., hm^3).

P_state

Named list with M and S vectors (kg), each of length tanks$Ntanks.

tanks

Tank geometry list as returned by dmsta_build_tanks(), including Ntanks, A_Tank, F_Tank, and Fcum.

inputs

Named list of day forcings and controls. Must include at least Date, Qi, Ci, Rain, Et, and Zcontrol (plus optional releases and recycle fields used downstream).

params

Hydrology parameter list passed to dmsta_flow_day_steps(). Must include A_cell.

Nsteps

Integer. Number of RK substeps per day.

Z_plant

Numeric scalar. Rolling/representative plant depth (m) used for blending.

Value

A named list with elements:

dMdt

Numeric scalar. Derivative of M (kg/day).

dSdt

Numeric scalar. Derivative of S (kg/day).

flux

List of per-area flux terms (rates) used internally: P_uptake, P_recycle, P_sed, P_direct.

diag

List of diagnostics: C, Y, z.

A named list containing updated states, mean derivatives, and averaged diagnostics over the step:

M_new, S_new

Updated tank states (kg).

dMdt_ts, dSdt_ts

Step-mean derivatives (kg/day).

P_uptake_ts, P_recycle_ts, P_sed_ts, P_direct_ts

Step-mean flux terms (rates).

C_ts, Y_ts, z_ts

Step-mean diagnostics.

A named list with components:

results

Daily totals and end-of-day state, including P_state_end.

budgets

Lists of water and mass budgets (mass may be NULL).

meta

Metadata and (by default) hydrology substep details for debugging/coupling.

Details

These functions are used by dmsta_flowP_series().

Internal diagnostics are computed from stage volume vV:

  • C = M / vV (ppb-like concentration)

  • Y = S / A_tank (areal store, mg/m^2 equivalent)

  • z = vV / A_tank (m)

Kinetics differ by ppar$PModel:

  • PModel == 2L: transformed kinetics using slot-1 coefficients.

  • otherwise: blended "transition" kinetics combining slots 1--2 and optionally slot-3 reservoir blending using Z_plant.

Contents

Developed by Paul Julian.
